terms.definition: A user-facing blind-box category name that follows a scene-plus-purpose pattern.
The content model composed of core_items, support_items, visible_small_items, conditional_items, and blocked_or_risky.
Rules that map the five-layer content model back to large, medium, small, and hanging.
A default small item that is grouped, blocky, or clearly supported by a visible surface.
An item that only works when there is a clear support, wrapping, or hanging relation.
An item isolated from default output because it depends on reflection, transparency, fine traces, or other unstable cues.
A category rewritten first to validate quality and compatibility before any full-library rollout.
